# Quadratic x-intercepts and solutions

## Short Teaching Summary
The number of x-intercepts a quadratic has can be no, 1, or 2.

## Difficulty
0.00

- Graph solution x-intercepts

- Graph solution x-intercepts (requires)

## Misconceptions
- None recorded.

## Best Examples
- None recorded.

## Best Analogy
- The x-intercepts of a quadratic can be thought of as the solutions to the quadratic equation.
